headline: Dave Eggers told OpenAI staff that ChatGPT was ‘silencing an entire generation’
summary: Author Dave Eggers spoke at OpenAI, criticizing ChatGPT's impact. He warned that AI could 'silence an entire generation' of writers. Eggers has a strong background in supporting writers and the arts.

headline: Google might not kneecap the Pixel 11a with an old processor
summary: A leak suggests the Pixel 11a will feature a flagship Tensor G6 processor. This would reverse the Pixel 10a's use of a previous-generation chip. Traditionally, Pixel 'a' models have used the latest Tensor chip.

headline: Google is open-sourcing its 3D emoji
summary: Google is making its 3D emoji designs available for public use. Users can now incorporate Google's 3D emoji into their own creations. The company shared details on the design process for World Emoji Day.

headline: GoPro’s discounted Max 2 bundle includes $100 worth of accessories
summary: The GoPro Max 2 accessory bundle is currently discounted to $369. This deal includes $100 worth of accessories with the 360-degree camera. It's a significant saving on a high-end action camera.

headline: Matt Damon Wants New Jason Bourne Movie to 'Be Like the First 3' as Work With Conclave Director Continues
summary: Matt Damon wants the upcoming Jason Bourne movie to emulate the first three films. Work on the movie is progressing with director Edward Berger. Damon provided an update on the film's creative direction.

headline: The Best Deals Today: PNY RTX 5070 OC, Apple AirPods 4, The Dark Knight Trilogy, and More
summary: Today's top deals include the PNY RTX 5070 OC graphics card. Shoppers can also find savings on Apple AirPods 4. The Dark Knight Trilogy is featured among other notable discounts.

headline: Steam Machine Engineers at Valve Signal Grim Future as Memory Crisis Is 'Still Getting Worse'
summary: Valve's Steam Machine engineers warn of a deepening memory crisis in the tech industry. Buyers are facing increasingly exorbitant prices for hardware components. The ongoing shortage signals a grim outlook for future tech costs.

headline: Call of Duty Movie to Take Place in the Modern Warfare Universe, Director Confirms
summary: The upcoming Call of Duty movie will be set in the Modern Warfare universe. This setting has been confirmed by the film's director. Paramount Pictures and Activision are collaborating on the project.

headline: Watch: Highlights as England stun France 6-4 in third-place play-off
summary: England defeated France 6-4 in an exciting third-place play-off match. Bukayo Saka scored a hat-trick, contributing to England's victory. This win marks England's best men's World Cup finish since 1966.

headline: Burnham to scrap digital ID to focus on cost of living in first major policy pledge
summary: Incoming Prime Minister Burnham plans to scrap digital ID initiatives. His government will prioritize addressing the cost of living crisis. This decision is Burnham's first major policy commitment.

headline: Tate brothers arrested in US as further UK charges take total to 59
summary: The Tate brothers have been arrested in the US on new charges. The Crown Prosecution Service is seeking their extradition to the UK. Their lawyer maintains the brothers' innocence against a total of 59 UK charges.

headline: New EU border system tripling time at passport control, airport boss says
summary: A new EU border system is reportedly tripling passport control wait times. An airport boss expressed concern over the extended delays. Ryanair has also warned passengers traveling to Europe to expect longer waits.
